description: Cell tower site resilience during power and backhaul outages.
challenge: Cell towers in remote or disaster-prone areas face frequent power and backhaul outages, risking loss of call/data records and extended downtime.
response: VITO logs all call/data events locally, manages backup power, and autonomously restarts radios after brownouts. When the link is restored, all records are synchronized to the NOC.
result: Maintained service continuity, no loss of regulatory data, and faster recovery after outages.
